module_sme_rollup.name: Employee Master & Data Foundation

statements.text: Support custom fields, work locations, multi-centre assignments, and applicant records with cross-module lookup.

statements.text: Encrypt employee data at rest and in transit; mask sensitive fields; enforce role-based access and audit logging.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your HR system is secure, accessible, and connected to your other business systems. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA when handling employee data like NRIC and salary information, and you need role-based access so payroll officers cannot see recruitment files. It matters when your team works from multiple locations and needs mobile access, or when you integrate payroll with your accounting system and government submissions like CPF.

Core HR.narrative: This is the backbone of your HR system — a single, authoritative record of every employee's personal details, contracts, and history. Singapore SMEs need this to stay compliant with MOM employment records requirements and to reduce manual paperwork. It matters when you onboard a new hire (ensuring all paperwork is captured and tracked) or when an employee leaves and you need a complete audit trail for disputes or references.

Time & Attendance.narrative: This family tracks when employees work, manages their leave, and calculates shift rosters — critical for payroll accuracy and labour law compliance. Singapore SMEs in retail, F&B, logistics, and healthcare depend on this to control labour costs and ensure fair scheduling. It matters when you have shift workers or multiple locations, or when you need to prove compliance with rest day and overtime rules during MOM inspections.

Payroll & Statutory.narrative: This family calculates salaries, deducts CPF and tax, generates payslips, and files mandatory returns to IRAS and MOM — the most regulated part of HR. Every Singapore SME must get this right or face penalties and employee disputes. It matters every month when you run payroll, and annually when you file CPF submissions and IRAS AIS returns; it also matters when you hire foreign workers and need to track work pass quotas.

Talent & Growth.narrative: This family helps you hire, develop, and retain your best people — from job posting through recruitment, performance reviews, training, and compensation planning. Singapore SMEs with high turnover or skills gaps benefit from structured hiring and learning records to reduce hiring costs and build capability. It matters when you are growing and need to hire quickly, or when you want to identify and develop internal talent to reduce dependency on external hires.

Lifecycle & Analytics.narrative: This family provides dashboards and insights into your workforce — headcount trends, turnover rates, cost per hire, and other metrics that help you make smarter HR decisions. Singapore SMEs use this to spot retention risks, benchmark hiring costs, and justify HR investment to leadership. It matters when you want to understand why people are leaving, or when you need data to support a business case for hiring or training.
